title: PPIP - Share Data toggle can be changed to ON or OFF while on Guest account
scenario: Share Data toggle in App Settings > General > Account can be freely toggled ON/OFF while using a Guest account
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. If not already onboarded, complete the onboarding flow until the PPIP (Privacy/Data Sharing) dialog appears.
3. On the PPIP dialog, select 'Share Data' to enable data sharing.
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
6. Tap the 'Share Data' toggle to switch it OFF.
8. Tap the 'Share Data' toggle again to switch it ON.
expected: The 'Share Data' toggle should be disabled or locked when using a Guest account, preventing the user from changing the data sharing preference after the initial choice during onboarding.
